title: Power Window Master Switch Input Inspection

crossRefs.label: Disconnect the power window master switch 24P coupler.

blocks.text: Power Window Master Switch Input Inspection
Perform the following checks before performing input inspections

items.text: Confirmation of DTC at HDS.
Inspect No.C5 (10A), No.C17 (15A), No.C18 (15A), No.C19 (15A), No.C20 (10A), No.C30 (15A), No.C39 (20A) and fuses in the fuse box for blown fuses and connections.

blocks.text: 1. Disconnect the power window master switch 24P coupler. 2. Perform input checks and if all is normal and there is an error in the system, step 3 Proceed to inspection terminal Wiring color Measuring conditions result Inspection items in case of abnormality 1 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and ground. 3 black 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and ground. 5 red 24-hour (e.g. observation, operation (of a machine), care (of patient)) Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and ground. 11 green Ignition ON mode Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and ground. 2 white Ignition ON mode Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and ground. 14 green Ignition ON mode Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and ground. 19 peach Lighting switch SMALL position Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and ground. 6 · 4 yellow · ash Short circuit between No.6 and No.5 terminals and between No.4 and No.1 terminals Driver Power Window Motor must be activated (UP) Short circuit between No.4 and No.5 terminals and between No.6 and No.1 terminal Driver Power Window Motor must be activated (DOWN) 9 · 10 red · peach Short circuit between No.9 and No.11 terminals and between No.10 and No.1 terminal Assistant Power Window Motor must be activated (UP) Short circuit between No.10 and No.11 terminals and between No.9 and No.1 terminals Assistant Power Window The motor must be activated (DOWN). 7 · 8 green · new leaves Short circuit between No.7 and No.2 terminals and between No.8 and No.1 terminals L. Rear power window motor must be activated (UP) Short circuit between No.8 and No.2 terminals and between No.7 and No.1 terminals L. Rear power window motor activation (DOWN) 12 · 13 green · hollow Short circuit between No.12 and No.14 terminals and between No.13 and No.1 terminal R. Rear power window motor must be activated (UP) Short circuit between No.13 and No.14 terminals and between No.12 and No.1 terminal R. Rear power window motor activation (DOWN) 3. Reconnect the power window master switch 24P coupler The following is a list of the most common problems with the 4. Perform input inspection, if all is normal and there is something wrong with the system, Replace power window master switch The following is a list of the most common problems with the If the power window master switch has been replaced, Reset and learn power windows. The following is a list of the most common problems with the inspection terminal Wiring color Measuring conditions result Inspection items in case of abnormality 15 yellow Ignition ON mode Battery voltage must be present between the inspection terminal and body ground. 18 ash Ignition ON mode There should be continuity between the inspection terminal and ground. 17 hollow Ignition ON mode, driver switch set to AUTO UP/DOWN To repeat 0-5V between No.17 and No.3 terminals 16 new leaves Ignition ON mode, driver switch set to AUTO UP/DOWN To repeat 0-5V between No.16 and No.3 terminals
